name: routing_specialist_finance_vs_winback
notes: Correct specialist routing per intent: a SINGLE-customer overdue-payment chase is Finance's advisory propose_payment_reminder capability (the manager's own tool call), NOT the classic dormant-cohort win-back (spawn_sales_recovery). Grounded in orchestrator_agent_system.md's explicit example ('chase an overdue payment is Finance's receivable-and-reminder tools'). Setup: `setup --onboarded --name convo-harness-<id>` (deliberately WITHOUT --seed-lapsed-customers — this is a single named customer, not a cohort) then `script <tenant> routing_specialist_finance_vs_winback.json`.

steps.message: Can you remind Meera Textiles that they still owe us ₹8,000 from last month's order?
steps.note: A single named overdue-payment ask. Expect a payment-reminder-flavored engagement (finance advisory), never the win-back-campaign approval-prompt framing meant for a lapsed-customer cohort.
